input.background: An environmental study looked at suspended particulate matter in air samples (μgms/m³) at two different sites. Data are listed here: Site 1: 68, 22, 36, 32, 42, 24, 28, 38; Site 2: 36, 38, 39, 40, 36, 34, 33, 32.
input.question: Interpret the stemplots to compare the two sites.

output.answer:
- The sites have similar central locations.
- Site 1 exhibits greater variability.
- A high outlier value is apparent at site 1.
